title: Self-Host Next.js on a VPS (Docker + Nginx + SSL)
description: Deploy a Next.js application to your own server using Docker for containerization, Nginx as a reverse proxy, Let's Encrypt SSL, and GitHub Actions for automated CI/CD.

steps.description: Containerize the Next.js app with a multi-stage Dockerfile
Set up CI/CD pipeline to build and push the Docker image on merge
Configure Nginx as a reverse proxy with SSL via Certbot on the VPS
